summary: Parallel review: FAIL (2 critical, 6 warning, 11 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/parsers.mjs:311` тАФ Stale comment references deleted `isGenericJson` function. Update to remove the stale reference.
ЁЯЯб `tasks/task-11/artifacts/` тАФ Missing `test-output.txt` artifact; artifacts directory never created despite "completed" handshake status

ЁЯЯб SPEC.md:39 тАФ `detectAndParse` signature drift: spec says `(stdout, artifactDir, config)` returning `{ findings, formatDetected }`, actual is `(text)` returning `Array<Finding>`. Design evolved intentionally (config lifted to `gate.mjs` helpers), but spec wasn't updated. Downstream tasks may build against a stale contract.
ЁЯЯб STATE.json:1 тАФ Feature `status: "completed"` but all 17 tasks are `status: "blocked"`. Data integrity concern for reporting.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/validator-parsers.mjs:1` тАФ `parseWithFormat` not exposed in public API; consumers needing forced format must import from internal `parsers.mjs`

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/gate.mjs:71` тАФ `outputFile` path check blocks `..` but not absolute paths. `path.join(cwd, "/etc/passwd")` resolves to `/etc/passwd`, bypassing the cwd prefix. Add `path.isAbsolute()` guard. Risk is low since `validators.json` is under version control, but defense-in-depth should cover this.

ЁЯФ┤ `bin/lib/validator-parsers.mjs:1` тАФ **Unnecessary indirection.** This 8-line re-export wrapper has zero production consumers. `gate.mjs:14` imports directly from `parsers.mjs`, bypassing this module entirely. It's also incomplete тАФ `parseWithFormat` (used in production) isn't re-exported. Fix: consolidate into one file, delete the wrapper, or make production code actually use it.

ЁЯФ┤ `test/parsers.test.mjs:4` тАФ **Dead imports.** `isUnsafeTaskId` and `buildConfigOverride` are imported but never called in any test case. This was flagged in the task-10 review and remains unfixed.
